blocks.text:
A conformance fixture exercising every micro-animation verb, so the Python reference and the JS
port are checked byte-for-byte on each.

blocks.source:
circle at=(-3,0) r=0.8 anim=spin anim-period=2
line from=(-3,0) to=(-3,0.8) anim=spin anim-about=(-3,0) anim-period=2
circle at=(0,0) r=0.6 fill=black anim=oscillate anim-amp=0.8 anim-dir=90 anim-period=1.5
circle at=(3,0) r=0.2 fill=black anim=along anim-path="(0,0);(1,1);(2,-1)" anim-period=3
pendulum at=(6,1.5) length=1.5 angle=20 anim=spin anim-about=(6,1.5) anim-swing=40 anim-period=2
mass m at=(-3,-3) size=0.5 anim=spin anim-cw=true anim-period=4
